Application For Extension Of Time To File Additional Bond
Off Calendar Aug-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John P. Carty, Esq. of the Law Offices of RUSHFORD & BONOTTO 916/565-0590 for defendant NATIONAL MARINE INC. moving to extend time to file additional bond
Richard A. Brody, Esq. of THE WARTNICK LAW FIRM 986-5566 for Plaintiffs and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant NATIONAL MARINE INC.'s application for extension of time to file additional bond is denied. Order signed in open court. (JJM/301/cl) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

AMENDED MOTION For Order To Increase Amount Of Post-Judgment Undertaking
Off Calendar May-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard A. Brody, Esq. THE WARTNICK LAW FIRM, (415) 986-5566 .appeared on behalf of plaintiff and moving party Richard Donaldson. Phillip R. Bonotto, Esq., RUSHFORD & BONOTTO, (916) 565-0599 appeared on behalf of defendant and opposing party National Marine, Inc.

After argument the Plaintiff's Motion for Order to Increase Amount of Post-Judgment Undertaking was granted. The undertaking shall equal one and a half times the amount of the original judgment plus interest to date. Order signed in open court. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

MOTION For Order To Increase Amount Of Post-Judgment Undertaking;

After argument the Plaintiff's Motion for Order to Increase Amount of Post-Judgment Undertaking was granted. The undertaking shall equal one and a half times the amount of the original judgment plus interest to date. Order signed in open court. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
